description: Complete vectorized math operators (Tier 1+2) and migrate tests to clunit2

userStories.title: Migrate test infrastructure to clunit2
userStories.description: Update test-package.lisp to use clunit2 instead of FiveAM. Update main.lisp with clunit2 runner. Update num-utils.asd test system to depend on clunit2.
acceptanceCriteria: num-utils.asd test system depends on clunit2
userStories.notes: test-package.lisp and num-utils.asd were already correct. Fixed run-tests in main.lisp to rebind *test-output-stream* to *standard-output* — clunit2 captures the stream at load time when quickloaded silently, discarding all output without this rebinding.

userStories.title: Migrate elementwise tests to clunit2
userStories.description: Rewrite tests/elementwise.lisp from FiveAM to clunit2 syntax. Convert def-suite/in-suite to defsuite, test to deftest, is to assert-true, signals to assert-condition.
acceptanceCriteria: All existing elementwise tests converted to clunit2
userStories.notes: Already done — file was already in clunit2 syntax with docstrings. Both tests (e-operations-tests, elementwise-float-contagion) pass with all assertions green.

userStories.title: Fix stale exports e1exp and e2exp
userStories.description: Remove e1exp and e2exp from the exports list in elementwise.lisp — they are exported but never defined. e1exp's role is filled by eexp, and e2exp is invalid (exp is unary in CL).
acceptanceCriteria: No other code references these symbols
userStories.notes: Already done — e1exp and e2exp are not present in the :export list of src/elementwise.lisp. Package compiles without warnings.

userStories.title: Add Tier 1 trig unary ops
userStories.description: Add define-e1 forms for: tan, asin, acos, atan (1-arg), sinh, cosh, tanh, asinh, acosh, atanh. Add corresponding exports.
userStories.notes: Already done — define-e1 forms for tan, asin, acos, e1atan, sinh, cosh, tanh, asinh, acosh, eatanh all present and exported.

userStories.title: Add Tier 1 rounding and misc unary ops
userStories.description: Add define-e1 forms for: round, truncate, signum. Add corresponding exports.
userStories.notes: Already done — define-e1 forms for e1round, e1truncate, esignum all present and exported.

userStories.title: Add Tier 1 binary ops
userStories.description: Add define-e2 forms for: atan (2-arg), round, truncate, floor, ceiling, rem, /=. Add corresponding exports.
userStories.notes: Already done — define-e2 forms for e2/=, e2atan, e2round, e2truncate, e2floor, e2ceiling, erem all present and exported.

userStories.title: Add eatan variadic wrapper
userStories.description: Create eatan function like elog that dispatches between e1atan (1-arg) and e2atan (2-arg). Add export.
userStories.notes: Already done — eatan function defined, dispatches to e1atan (1-arg) or e2atan (2-arg), exported.

userStories.title: Add Tier 2 complex ops
userStories.description: Add define-e1 forms for: phase, realpart, imagpart, cis. Add define-e2 for: complex. Add corresponding exports.
userStories.notes: Already done — ephase, erealpart, eimagpart, ecis (e1), ecomplex (e2) all present and exported.

userStories.title: Add Tier 2 float-rounding ops
userStories.description: Add define-e1 forms for: ffloor, fceiling, fround, ftruncate. Add define-e2 forms for the same 4. Add corresponding exports.
userStories.notes: Already done — e1ffloor, e1fceiling, e1fround, e1ftruncate (unary) and e2ffloor, e2fceiling, e2fround, e2ftruncate (binary) all present and exported.

userStories.title: Add Tier 2 binary max/min
userStories.description: Add define-e2 forms for: max, min. Add corresponding exports.
acceptanceCriteria: Does not conflict with existing emax/emin reductions
userStories.notes: Already done — e2max, e2min present and exported. No conflict with emax/emin reductions (different names).

userStories.title: Update package docstring
userStories.description: Update the :documentation string in the uiop:define-package form to reflect the expanded operator set including trig, rounding, complex, and float-rounding families.
acceptanceCriteria: Docstring accurately describes all operator families
userStories.notes: Already done — comprehensive :documentation string covers all operator families including trig, rounding, complex, float-rounding, and variadic.

userStories.title: Write trig unary tests
userStories.description: Write clunit2 tests for all Tier 1 trig unary ops: etan, easin, eacos, e1atan, esinh, ecosh, etanh, easinh, eacosh, eatanh. Test scalar passthrough, array mapping, and known identities.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one test per trig function
Tests cover scalar and array cases

userStories.title: Write rounding and misc unary tests
userStories.description: Write tests for e1round, e1truncate, esignum on scalars and arrays.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover scalar and array cases
userStories.notes: elementwise-rounding suite added with tests for e1round, e1truncate, esignum (scalar and array). All pass.

userStories.title: Write Tier 1 binary op tests
userStories.description: Write tests for e2atan, e2round, e2truncate, e2floor, e2ceiling, erem, e2/=. Test scalar-scalar, scalar-array, array-array, and dimension mismatch.
userStories.notes: elementwise-binary suite added with tests for e2atan, e2round, e2truncate, e2floor, e2ceiling, erem, e2/=. Covers scalar-scalar, array-array, and dimension mismatch. All pass.

userStories.title: Write eatan wrapper tests
userStories.description: Write tests verifying eatan dispatches correctly for 1-arg and 2-arg calls.
userStories.notes: eatan wrapper tests added to elementwise-binary suite: eatan-1-arg (dispatches to e1atan) and eatan-2-arg (dispatches to e2atan), both scalar and array cases. All pass.

userStories.title: Write Tier 2 complex op tests
userStories.description: Write tests for ephase, erealpart, eimagpart, ecis, ecomplex with complex number scalars and arrays.
userStories.notes: elementwise-complex suite added with tests for ephase, erealpart, eimagpart, ecis, ecomplex (scalar and array). All pass.

userStories.title: Write Tier 2 float-rounding tests
userStories.description: Write tests for all 8 f-rounding variants (e1ffloor, e2ffloor, etc.) with known values.
userStories.notes: Float-rounding tests added to elementwise-rounding suite: e1ffloor, e1fceiling, e1fround, e1ftruncate (with float type assertions), e2ffloor, e2fceiling, e2fround, e2ftruncate. All pass.

userStories.title: Write binary max/min tests
userStories.description: Write tests for e2max, e2min with scalar-array and array-array cases.
userStories.notes: elementwise-reduction suite added with tests for e2max and e2min (scalar-scalar, scalar-array, array-array). All pass.

userStories.title: Migrate remaining test files to clunit2
userStories.description: Migrate all test files (arithmetic, chebyshev, num=, interval, etc.) from FiveAM to clunit2. Fix all bare (not ...) non-assertions.
acceptanceCriteria: All test files use clunit2 syntax
userStories.notes: This is a larger story — may need multiple iterations
